'''davana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycaloside|mycaloside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycaloside|mycaloside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| davana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævænæth|dævænæth]] || [[word:dævænæj|dævænæj]] || [[word:dævænæsh|dævænæsh]] || [[word:dævænæ|dævænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:davavanath|davavanath]] || [[word:davavanaj|davavanaj]] || [[word:davavanash|davavanash]] || [[word:davavana|davavana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:davanath|davanath]] || [[word:davanaj|davanaj]] || [[word:davanash|davanash]] || [[word:davana|davana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:davafnafth|davafnafth]] || [[word:davafnafj|davafnafj]] || [[word:davafnafsh|davafnafsh]] || [[word:davafnaf|davafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davanatha|davanatha]] || [[word:davanaja|davanaja]] || [[word:davanasha|davanasha]] || [[word:davanaka|davanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davanath|davanath]] || [[word:davanaj|davanaj]] || [[word:davanash|davanash]] || [[word:davana|davana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davanathal|davanathal]] || [[word:davanajal|davanajal]] || [[word:davanashal|davanashal]] || [[word:davanakal|davanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davanaathatha|davanaathatha]] || [[word:davanaajaja|davanaajaja]] || [[word:davanaashasha|davanaashasha]] || [[word:davanaaka|davanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davanathan|davanathan]] || [[word:davanajan|davanajan]] || [[word:davanashan|davanashan]] || [[word:davanakan|davanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davanathaoro|davanathaoro]] || [[word:davanajaoro|davanajaoro]] || [[word:davanashaoro|davanashaoro]] || [[word:davanakaoro|davanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
